name: @svene/juanfi-admin
description: Typed admin client for JuanFI v4.x/v5 firmware. Drives /admin/api/* routes with pipe-delimited response parsing.

scripts.build: npx tsdown && cp dist/juanfi-admin.bundle.iife.js dist/juanfi-admin.min.js && cp dist/juanfi-admin.bundle.iife.js.map dist/juanfi-admin.min.js.map && cp dist/juanfi-admin.min.js dist/juanfi-admin.min.js.map ../../public/js/
